metadata.title: Iran-Israel Conflict Damage Tracker
metadata.description: Comprehensive mapping of all confirmed, reported, and rumored damage from the Iran-Israel conflict across all countries, covering civilian, infrastructure, military, and nuclear facility damage.

damageLocations.name: IRGC Aerospace Force HQ
damageLocations.description: Underground command bunkers destroyed by GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrators delivered by B-2 Spirit bombers. At least 40 senior IRGC officers killed including two brigadier generals.

damageLocations.name: Supreme Leader's Complex (Niavaran)
damageLocations.description: Tomahawk cruise missile strikes on Khamenei's residential and administrative complex. Significant structural damage confirmed. Khamenei reportedly relocated hours prior.

damageLocations.name: Ministry of Defense Compound
damageLocations.description: JASSM-ER cruise missiles collapsed multiple buildings and destroyed the central communications hub at the Iranian Ministry of Defense.

damageLocations.name: Imam Khomeini Airport Military Depot
damageLocations.description: Satellite imagery suggests military logistics depot adjacent to Imam Khomeini International Airport was struck. Secondary explosions visible for hours suggest ammunition stores were hit.

damageLocations.name: Isfahan Nuclear Technology Center
damageLocations.description: Israeli F-35I jets destroyed centrifuge assembly halls and contaminated surrounding areas with low-level radioactive material at the Isfahan Nuclear Technology Center.

damageLocations.name: Isfahan Power Generation Station
damageLocations.description: US Navy Tomahawk cruise missiles struck the power station supplying electricity to nuclear infrastructure, causing widespread blackouts across Isfahan province.

damageLocations.name: Natanz Uranium Enrichment Facility
damageLocations.description: Multiple waves of Israeli aircraft delivered bunker busters on the deeply buried facility. IAEA confirmed underground centrifuge halls suffered catastrophic structural collapse.

damageLocations.name: Fordow Fuel Enrichment Plant
damageLocations.description: Hardened facility buried inside a mountain near Qom was struck in sustained 45-minute assault. All access tunnels collapsed, facility rendered inoperable.

damageLocations.name: Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant
damageLocations.description: Tomahawk missiles struck reactor cooling systems and auxiliary buildings. IAEA dispatched emergency teams for radiological contamination assessment.

damageLocations.name: IRIN Naval Base
damageLocations.description: Massive air and naval strike destroyed drydocks, missile boat pens, naval HQ building. Three frigates sunk at moorings. IRINS Dena subsequently sunk in Persian Gulf.

damageLocations.name: Shahid Doran Airbase
damageLocations.description: Israeli F-15I destroyed hardened aircraft shelters housing Iranian Su-35 fighters. 6 aircraft destroyed on ground along with radar installations.
damageLocations.casualties: 18 air force personnel killed, 6 aircraft destroyed

damageLocations.name: IRGC Regional HQ
damageLocations.description: Tomahawk cruise missiles destroyed main command building and barracks at IRGC Ground Forces regional headquarters.

damageLocations.name: Quds Force Training Facility
damageLocations.description: Social media reports of explosions near suspected IRGC Quds Force facility. Pentagon declined to comment. Satellite imagery showed burn scars consistent with cruise missile impacts.

damageLocations.name: 92nd Armored Division Base
damageLocations.description: Vehicle depots, fuel storage, and mobile missile launcher staging area destroyed. Secondary explosions continued for hours.

damageLocations.name: Minab Girls' Secondary School
damageLocations.description: US JASSM-ER struck building identified as suspected IRGC warehouse — actually a girls' school in session. Deadliest single incident of the war.

damageLocations.name: Parchin Military Research Complex
damageLocations.description: Underground chambers containing nuclear weapons research equipment destroyed. Massive explosions reported as explosive testing equipment detonated.

damageLocations.name: Centrifuge Component Factory
damageLocations.description: Multiple explosions near centrifuge component manufacturing facility. Satellite imagery showed significant damage to factory buildings.

damageLocations.name: IRGC Missile Storage Tunnels
damageLocations.description: Explosions reported near suspected underground missile storage tunnels. Iran condemned strikes near holy city religious sites.

damageLocations.name: IR-40 Heavy Water Reactor
damageLocations.description: Heavy water reactor struck by Israeli jets. Reactor vessel breached, cooling systems destroyed, facility permanently inoperable.

damageLocations.name: Underground Ballistic Missile Base
damageLocations.description: B-2 bombers struck hardened underground base housing Shahab-3 and Emad missiles. Massive secondary explosions from propellant detonation.

damageLocations.name: Kirya Military HQ Area
damageLocations.description: Iranian Emad and Shahab-3 missiles penetrated defenses, impacting near Kirya military HQ. Significant structural damage to surrounding buildings.

damageLocations.name: Ben Gurion International Airport
damageLocations.description: Missile debris and possible warhead impact near Ben Gurion Airport forced complete shutdown of Israel's main aviation hub. Runway damage reported but not officially confirmed.

damageLocations.name: Haifa Port & Oil Refinery
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket barrage struck port area and oil refineries. Direct hit on fuel storage tank triggered massive 3-day fire. Port operations halted indefinitely.

damageLocations.name: Jerusalem — Multiple Impact Sites
damageLocations.description: 9 successive missile waves over 4 hours overwhelmed defenses. Multiple impacts across city including near Old City walls. International condemnation swift.

damageLocations.name: Nevatim Air Base
damageLocations.description: Two warheads impacted base perimeter during Operation True Promise 3, damaging taxiways and a maintenance hangar. Home to Israel's F-35I fleet.

damageLocations.name: Negev Nuclear Research Center (Dimona)
damageLocations.description: Khorramshahr missiles reportedly directed at Dimona nuclear facility. Full media blackout imposed. Seismic sensors detected impacts but Israel stated all threats neutralized.

damageLocations.name: Beit Shemesh Residential Block
damageLocations.description: Iranian Emad warhead struck 4-story apartment block after evading Iron Dome. Building collapsed entirely. Rescue operations continued 36 hours.
damageLocations.source: IDF Home Front Command / Israeli Media

damageLocations.name: Ashdod Port
damageLocations.description: Iranian cruise missiles struck Israel's largest cargo port, hitting container yards and grain silo. Port operations suspended, shipping diverted to Eilat.

damageLocations.name: Ramat David Airbase
damageLocations.description: Combined drone/missile swarm with 50+ Shahed-136 drones saturating defenses. Fateh-110 missiles struck runway and flight line, destroying 3 F-16I aircraft.

damageLocations.name: Kiryat Shmona — City-wide Damage
damageLocations.description: 200+ Fajr-5 and Katyusha rockets caused widespread destruction to residential buildings, schools, and infrastructure. City mostly evacuated prior.

damageLocations.name: Al-Udeid Air Base
damageLocations.description: 3 missiles struck flight line, damaging KC-135 tankers and a C-17 transport at the largest US military facility in the Middle East.

damageLocations.name: Camp Arifjan
damageLocations.description: Fateh-110 missiles struck vehicle staging areas and warehouse complex, destroying dozens of MRAPs and supply containers.

damageLocations.name: Port Shuaiba Navy Logistics
damageLocations.description: Emad missile struck US Navy personnel quarters during early morning hours. Deadliest single US loss in opening hours of Iran's retaliation.

damageLocations.name: Al Dhafra Air Base
damageLocations.description: 2 cruise missiles struck taxiway infrastructure at base housing US F-35A fighters and MQ-9 Reapers. Flight operations temporarily halted.

damageLocations.name: Erbil Air Base
damageLocations.description: Precision missiles struck base perimeter, destroying communications equipment and drone hangar at US special operations facility.

damageLocations.name: Al-Asad Air Base
damageLocations.description: 15 Qiam-1 missiles targeted the base. 4 struck occupied facilities causing significant casualties despite partial evacuation to shelters.

damageLocations.name: NSA Bahrain (5th Fleet HQ)
damageLocations.description: Unconfirmed reports of strikes on US Fifth Fleet headquarters. Both Bahraini and US officials declined to comment. Residents reported air defense activations.

damageLocations.name: Ras Laffan LNG Terminal
damageLocations.description: World's largest LNG export terminal struck. Fires at two liquefaction trains, loading berth damaged. Global LNG prices surged 40% within hours.

damageLocations.name: Jebel Ali Port Complex
damageLocations.description: Unverified reports of explosions near the largest port in the Middle East. UAE denied incident but shipping satellite data showed vessels diverting for 18 hours.

damageLocations.name: Israeli Intelligence Listening Post
damageLocations.description: Iranian Mohajer-6 drones struck suspected Israeli intelligence post. Azerbaijan recalled ambassador. NATO member Turkey placed forces on alert.

damageLocations.name: Hezbollah Command Infrastructure (Dahieh)
damageLocations.description: Entire city blocks flattened in Beirut's southern suburbs targeting underground Hezbollah command bunkers. Lebanon called it disproportionate escalation.
damageLocations.casualties: 65+ killed including Hezbollah commanders, 200+ civilian casualties

damageLocations.name: Hezbollah Positions & UNIFIL Post
damageLocations.description: Israeli strikes hit Hezbollah rocket launchers and weapons storage. UN peacekeeping outpost damaged, UNIFIL evacuated.

damageLocations.name: Houthi Military Leadership Compound
damageLocations.description: US Tomahawk and MQ-9 strikes killed senior Houthi commander responsible for Red Sea anti-shipping attacks.
damageLocations.casualties: 20+ Houthi fighters killed including senior commander

damageLocations.name: Kharg Island Petroleum Infrastructure
damageLocations.description: Israeli F-35I strikes targeted petroleum export infrastructure on Kharg Island, Iran's primary oil export terminal handling 90% of crude exports. Multiple storage tanks and loading facilities damaged.

damageLocations.name: Bat Yam Commercial District
damageLocations.description: Missile debris fell in commercial district. Military censors restricted reporting but social media showed shattered storefronts and car fires.

damageLocations.name: Sweida Building Strike
damageLocations.description: Iranian missile struck building in southern Syrian city. The attack highlighted the expanding geographic reach of Iranian retaliatory strikes.

damageLocations.name: RAF Akrotiri Runway
damageLocations.description: Iranian-made drone damaged runway at British RAF military base. First attack on European NATO territory in the conflict.

damageLocations.name: Al-Kharj Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Projectile struck residential facility south of Riyadh. First civilian deaths in Saudi Arabia during the conflict.

damageLocations.name: Salman Industrial City Desalination Plant
damageLocations.description: Hostile drone struck desalination plant causing fire. Attack on critical water infrastructure drew international condemnation.

damageLocations.name: Tehran Energy Infrastructure
damageLocations.description: IDF wide-scale strikes on Tehran energy resources and regime targets in new phase of conflict.

damageLocations.name: Doha (Intercepted Attack)
damageLocations.description: 17 ballistic missiles and 6 drones launched at Qatar — all intercepted by Qatari and allied air defense systems.

damageLocations.name: Sitra Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Iranian ballistic missile struck residential apartment buildings in Sitra district. Significant structural damage to multiple buildings. 32 civilians wounded in the attack.

damageLocations.name: Manama Residential Building
damageLocations.description: Iranian missile struck a residential building in the Bahraini capital Manama, killing one civilian. The attack on a densely populated urban area drew international condemnation.

damageLocations.name: Eastern Tehran Residential Buildings
damageLocations.description: US-Israeli airstrike destroyed multiple residential buildings in eastern Tehran, killing at least 40 people. Oil facility strikes nearby caused toxic smoke to blanket the capital.

damageLocations.name: Arak Residential Building
damageLocations.description: Airstrike hit a residential building in Arak, western Iran. Five killed and several injured according to ISNA.

damageLocations.name: Isfahan UNESCO Heritage Sites
damageLocations.description: Strikes damaged multiple UNESCO World Heritage sites: Naqsh-e Jahan Square, Chehel Sotoun palace, Ali Qapu, Shah Mosque, and Teymouri Hall. Irreplaceable cultural heritage damaged.

damageLocations.name: Seef Commercial District
damageLocations.description: Building damaged in reported Iranian drone strike in the Seef commercial district of Manama, Bahrain.

damageLocations.name: Commercial Vessels — Strait of Hormuz (Day 12)
damageLocations.description: 3 more commercial ships attacked by IRGC Navy on Day 12, bringing total to 14 vessels damaged or sunk since war began. 330+ vessels at anchor. Shipping traffic down 95%. Insurance withdrawn by all major providers.

damageLocations.name: Khoramshahr Missile Impact Zone
damageLocations.description: Iran deployed Khoramshahr super-heavy ballistic missiles for the first time (37th wave). Iran's most powerful conventional missile with 1,800km range and 1,800kg warhead. Multiple intercepted by Arrow-3 system; damage assessment ongoing for those that penetrated defenses.

damageLocations.name: Moshav Haniel Residential Strike
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket directly struck and virtually destroyed a home in Moshav Haniel, central Israel. Building destroyed except reinforced safe room. Two residents survived.

damageLocations.name: Iraqi Oil Port Tanker Damage
damageLocations.description: Two foreign oil tankers attacked in Iraqi territorial waters, causing Iraq to shut down all oil port operations.

damageLocations.name: Beirut Corniche Seafront
damageLocations.description: Israeli overnight strikes hit Beirut's Corniche — a designated evacuation area. 8+ killed, buildings damaged along the seafront promenade.

damageLocations.name: Al-Nabi Shayth, Beqaa Valley
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Hezbollah positions in Beqaa Valley. 2 Hezbollah members killed, 6 injured.

damageLocations.name: Tehran (wide-scale wave)
damageLocations.description: New wave of Israeli strikes across Tehran. Part of 6,000+ total CENTCOM targets struck since Feb 28. Multiple explosions heard across the city.

damageLocations.name: KC-135 Crash Site near Turaibil
damageLocations.description: US KC-135 Stratotanker aerial refueling aircraft crashed near Turaibil, western Iraq. Circumstances under investigation.

damageLocations.name: Makhmour Coalition Base
damageLocations.description: Coalition base near Makhmour hit by drone strike attributed to Iran-backed Iraqi militias. One French soldier killed, several others wounded. France's first combat fatality in the conflict.

damageLocations.name: Oil Tankers in Iraqi Waters (Basra)
damageLocations.description: Multiple oil tankers struck in Iraqi waters near Basra by Iranian anti-ship missiles, part of expanding campaign against energy infrastructure in the Gulf.

damageLocations.name: Zarzir, Northern Israel
damageLocations.description: Iranian ballistic missile impact in the northern town of Zarzir. Woman moderately wounded by shrapnel, 50+ injured by broken glass and debris.

damageLocations.name: Central Israel — Cluster Missile Impact Zone
damageLocations.description: 11 Iranian cluster missiles penetrated Israeli air defenses. One dropped approximately 70 submunitions over central Israel. 2 killed, multiple wounded.

damageLocations.name: Al-Quds Day Rally Site, Tehran
damageLocations.description: Explosion at Al-Quds Day rally in Tehran. 1 killed. Cause under investigation — rally was held in solidarity with Palestinians amid ongoing conflict.

damageLocations.name: Zrarieh Bridge (Litani River)
damageLocations.description: Israel destroyed the Zrarieh Bridge over the Litani River — first acknowledged strike on civilian infrastructure in Lebanon.

damageLocations.name: Tehran Al-Quds Day Rally Area
damageLocations.description: Explosion near Al-Quds Day rally in Tehran. 1 woman killed. Part of highest volume strikes day — 15,000+ total targets hit.

damageLocations.name: Beirut Targeted Strike Area
damageLocations.description: Israeli targeted killing attempt in Beirut kills several. Part of expanded campaign hitting areas never previously targeted. 25+ killed across Lebanon on Day 14.

damageLocations.name: Kharg Island Military Facilities
damageLocations.description: CENTCOM bombing raid destroys army defenses, Joshen Sea Base, airport control tower, helicopter hangar on Kharg Island. Oil infrastructure intact. 15+ explosions confirmed.

damageLocations.name: US Embassy Baghdad Helipad
damageLocations.description: Missile strikes helipad, drone damages radar system at US Embassy compound in Baghdad. Smoke seen rising from compound. Embassy structure intact.

damageLocations.name: Iran Space Research Center, Tehran
damageLocations.description: IDF destroys Iran's primary space research center and air defense factories in Tehran.

damageLocations.name: Fujairah Port Oil Loading Facilities
damageLocations.description: Drone attack causes fire, forces suspension of oil loading operations at Fujairah port — key Hormuz alternative.

damageLocations.name: KC-135 Crash Site, Western Iraq
damageLocations.description: KC-135 Stratotanker crash site. All 6 crew killed. CENTCOM says not hostile fire.

damageLocations.name: Kharg Island Military Facilities (90 targets)
damageLocations.description: CENTCOM struck 90 military targets — naval mine storage, missile bunkers, air defenses, naval base, airport control tower, helicopter hangar. Oil infrastructure deliberately spared.

damageLocations.name: Ahmad Al-Jaber Air Base
damageLocations.description: Iranian drones hit Kuwait's Ahmad Al-Jaber Air Base as part of retaliatory strikes on Gulf state hosts of US forces.

damageLocations.name: Shiraz Military Installations
damageLocations.description: Multiple military installations near Shiraz struck — 20 explosions reported overnight

damageLocations.name: Dezful Air Base
damageLocations.description: Dezful Air Base damaged in overnight US-Israeli strikes

damageLocations.name: Residential Building, Northern Sidon
damageLocations.description: Residential building in northern Sidon struck by Israeli airstrike, killing 1 civilian and causing fire

damageLocations.name: Jask Port Facilities
damageLocations.description: Jask port naval facilities damaged by US cruise missile strike targeting Iranian naval infrastructure

damageLocations.name: Residential Area, Holon
damageLocations.description: Iranian ballistic missile strikes residential area in Holon, Tel Aviv District. 2 killed, 12 injured. Multiple buildings damaged.

damageLocations.name: Residential Building, Bnei Brak
damageLocations.description: 4-story residential building upper floor struck by Iranian cluster munition. 3 wounded. Significant structural damage to upper floors.

damageLocations.name: Baghdad International Airport
damageLocations.description: Runway and airport facilities hit by 5 rockets. Flights suspended. 5 wounded. US Embassy issues security alert urging American citizens to leave Iraq.

damageLocations.name: Ali Al Salem Airbase Shelter
damageLocations.description: Italian Air Force MQ-9 Reaper drone destroyed in hangar by Iranian drone/rocket attack. First NATO ally hardware loss in the conflict. All personnel safe.

damageLocations.name: IRGC/Basij HQ, Hamedan
damageLocations.description: IRGC and Basij headquarters destroyed by IDF wide-scale strikes in Hamedan province, western Iran. Part of 200+ target wave operation.

damageLocations.name: Dubai International Airport Fuel Tank
damageLocations.description: Iranian drone struck fuel storage tank near Dubai International Airport causing massive fire. All flights suspended for 7+ hours. One of the world's busiest airports completely shut down.

damageLocations.name: Fujairah Oil Hub
damageLocations.description: Fire at Fujairah petroleum storage facility from Iranian drone/missile attack. Continued targeting of UAE energy infrastructure outside the Strait of Hormuz.

damageLocations.name: Khiam Town Infrastructure
damageLocations.description: IDF airstrikes on town infrastructure in Khiam supporting ground operation. Hezbollah positions and surrounding buildings damaged as Israeli troops enter the town.

damageLocations.name: Mehrabad Airport Military Section
damageLocations.description: IDF destroys Khamenei's personal aircraft and military hangars at Mehrabad Airport in Tehran. Satellite imagery confirms destruction of military section of the dual-use airport.

damageLocations.name: Al-Kharj Military Compound
damageLocations.description: 6 Iranian ballistic missiles struck military compound near Al-Kharj. 2 killed, 12 injured. Part of overnight barrage that included 60+ drones intercepted by Saudi air defenses.

damageLocations.name: Iran Space Research Center
damageLocations.description: Israel destroyed Iran's primary space research center used for anti-satellite weapons development and Chamran-1 satellite program.

damageLocations.name: Umm Al Quwain Building
damageLocations.description: Building targeted in drone attack, resulting in fire. No casualties.

damageLocations.name: Baghdad International Airport
damageLocations.description: 5 rockets struck airport area. Kataib Hezbollah claimed attack targeting Camp Victory. 5 wounded.

damageLocations.name: Rishon Lezion Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Cluster missile barrage damaged 10 locations (7 in Rishon Lezion, others in Lod and Shoham). One home largely destroyed.

damageLocations.name: Nahariya Residential Building
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket struck residential building causing fire. 6 wounded including 4 children.

damageLocations.name: Fujairah Oil Industry Zone (2nd strike)
damageLocations.description: Iranian drone hit oil zone for second time in 2 days. ADNOC suspended loading operations. UAE's only non-Hormuz oil export route.

damageLocations.name: Supreme Leader's Aircraft, Mehrabad Airport
damageLocations.description: IDF destroyed aircraft used by Iran's Supreme Leader at Mehrabad International Airport.

damageLocations.name: Shah Gas Field (South Pars Complex)
damageLocations.description: Israeli airstrike on Shah gas field at South Pars — world's largest natural gas field. Major fire reported. Shared with Qatar.

damageLocations.name: Al-Rasheed Hotel Area, Green Zone
damageLocations.description: US drone strike near Al-Rasheed Hotel in Green Zone killed IRGC commander al-Askari.
Cluster munitions struck 10+ locations in central Israel. Train station and residential buildings damaged. First confirmed use of cluster munitions in conflict.
Third consecutive day of strikes on Fujairah oil zone. Oil loading operations suspended. Commercial tanker hit.
US airstrikes hit residential areas in Arak, killing at least 14 civilians including children. Widespread destruction reported.
Israeli airstrikes on southern Beirut suburbs targeting Hezbollah command infrastructure during ground offensive.

damageLocations.name: Jerusalem Old City Holy Sites
damageLocations.description: Missile and interceptor fragments hit Temple Mount/Al-Aqsa Mosque, Church of Holy Sepulchre, Armenian Patriarchate, and Jewish Quarter.

damageLocations.name: Shah Gas Field
damageLocations.description: Iran struck UAE's Shah gas field, setting it ablaze. The field supplies 20% of UAE natural gas.

damageLocations.name: Nahariya Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket hit residential area in Nahariya causing fire. 6 people wounded.

damageLocations.name: Karmiel Residential Home
damageLocations.description: Hezbollah rocket hit a residential home in Karmiel. Residents survived in safe room.

damageLocations.name: Ramat Gan Residential (Stairwell)
damageLocations.description: IRGC missile strike killed elderly couple in residential building stairwell. Shrapnel also hit Tel Aviv Savidor Center train station.

damageLocations.name: Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant Premises
damageLocations.description: Projectile hit premises near metrological service building, close to operating power unit. IAEA confirmed no reactor damage.

damageLocations.name: US Embassy Baghdad (Outer Wall)
damageLocations.description: Explosive drone struck outer wall of US Embassy. Fire sparked. 2 other drones intercepted.

damageLocations.name: Beirut Kafaat/Haret Hreik
damageLocations.description: Israeli strikes on Kafaat and Haret Hreik areas. 6 killed, 24 injured.

damageLocations.name: South Pars Gas Field (Assaluyeh)
damageLocations.description: Gas storage tanks struck, two refineries halted (~100M cubic meters/day). World's largest gas field.

damageLocations.name: Beirut Bachoura Building
damageLocations.description: Building destroyed after evacuation order. 4th time struck. 6 killed.

damageLocations.name: Dorud Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Densely populated area struck. 7 killed, 56 injured.

damageLocations.name: Larestan Judiciary Facility
damageLocations.description: Judiciary facility struck, civilians and judicial staff killed/injured.

damageLocations.name: Ras Laffan LNG Facility
damageLocations.description: World's largest LNG export terminal (~20% global LNG). 'Extensive damage' from Iranian missile. Fires contained.

damageLocations.name: Hebron Beauty Salon
damageLocations.description: Iranian missile hit beauty salon near Hebron. 3 Palestinians killed.

damageLocations.name: Ras Laffan LNG (2nd Strike)
damageLocations.description: Second strike on world's largest LNG facility. Sizeable fires, extensive further damage.

damageLocations.name: South Pars Gas Treatment Facilities
damageLocations.description: 4 gas treatment plants at South Pars/Asaluyeh struck by IAF. Taken offline to contain fires. 36% of Iran's gas reserves affected.

damageLocations.name: Bandar Anzali Naval Base
damageLocations.description: IDF destroyed 4 missile boats, a corvette, and naval infrastructure at Bandar Anzali on Caspian Sea.

damageLocations.name: Ras Laffan LNG Complex
damageLocations.description: Iranian missile causes extensive damage to Ras Laffan Industrial City. Shell Pearl GTL plant also damaged. Fire extinguished, no casualties.

damageLocations.name: SAMREF Refinery, Yanbu
damageLocations.description: Iranian drone strikes SAMREF refinery in Red Sea port of Yanbu. Damage assessment underway.

damageLocations.name: Habshan Gas Facility
damageLocations.description: Abu Dhabi shuts Habshan gas facilities after debris from intercepted Iranian strike. Bab field also affected.

damageLocations.name: Ramat Gan Residential Area
damageLocations.description: Iranian revenge missile destroys apartment in Ramat Gan, killing couple in their 70s.
